🖨 LRN Man DVD Label — Print Instructions

  • Print on Avery 5692, 8692, 8942 or compatible CD/DVD label sheets (2 labels per sheet).
  • Or print on plain paper/glossy stock and trim to the dashed circle.
  • Set printer to Actual Size / 100% — do not scale to fit.
  • Each label is exactly 4.72 inches (120mm) diameter · center hole 0.63".
  • The dashed circle is a screen-only cut guide — it will not appear on your printout.
